title: Shared-desktop reliability — brief focus acquisition, user app restoration after interactions
description:
Finish the shared-desktop interaction contract so simemu can briefly take focus for fragile operations and then restore the user's previous app and window state.

Acceptance criteria:
- focus-sensitive iOS actions use a single helper path for brief activation and restoration
- the previously frontmost app is restored after simulator interactions when feasible
- failures return structured diagnostics instead of silently stealing focus
- regression coverage proves the restore path is exercised for the shared helpers

context.text: Implemented _with_brief_focus() context manager. All iOS interaction paths (tap, swipe, long_press, key, rotate) now save/restore the frontmost app. Structured diagnostics on failure. 5 new tests. 314 total tests pass.

acceptanceCriteria: focus-sensitive simulator actions use a shared restoration path
the previous frontmost app is restored after interactions when possible
focus acquisition failures emit actionable diagnostics
tests cover the shared focus/restore helpers
